removedAssets: A global provider of critical internet infrastructure and domain name registry services.
recommendations: **Scope expansion detected** – 2 new asset(s) added. Review the new targets and begin reconnaissance. Priority targets: *.verisign.com, *.vrtz.com

scope_assets: A global provider of critical internet infrastructure and domain name registry services.
exclusions: and Verisign believes that working with skilled security researchers across the globe is crucial in identifying weaknesses in any technology. We are excited for you to participate as a security researcher to help us identify vulnerabilities in our assets. Good luck
prevProgram.reward_range: For the initial prioritization/rating of findings, this engagement will use the Bugcrowd Vulnerability Rating Taxonomy. However, it is important to note that in some cases a vulnerability priority will be modified due to its likelihood or impact. In any instance where an issue is downgraded, a full, detailed explanation will be provided to the researcher - along with the opportunity to appeal, and make a case for a higher priority.
prevProgram.last_seen_at: A global provider of critical internet infrastructure and domain name registry services.
